title: Amtech H0815 3 Piece Colour Coded Nail Punch Set
features: DURABLE: This nail punch set is made from heat treated carbon steel for strength and durability
VERSATILE AND EASY TO USE: Colour coded for easy identification and with non-slip plastic grips, the punches are designed to easily set nails and brads for a smooth finish
SIZES: The set includes sizes 1/32", 1/16" and 3/32"
ERGONOMIC GRIP: Comfortable to hold for better control
DIY & TRADE USE: Reliable choice for both professionals and home projects
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1 x 3Pc Colour Coded Nail Punch Set See more
